mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.page_views_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, session_id, user_id, page_url, page_type, referrer_url, device_type, browser, ip_address, country, duration_ms, created_time ) SELECT pv.id, pv.tenant, NOW(), pv.session_id, pv.user_id, pv.page_url, pv.page_type, pv.referrer_url, pv.device_type, pv.browser, pv.ip_address, pv.country, pv.duration_ms, pv.created_time FROM hm_clickstream.page_views pv WHERE pv.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'

INSERT INTO hm_query.click_events_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, session_id, user_id, element_type, element_id, page_url, event_data_json, created_time ) SELECT ce.id, ce.tenant, NOW(), ce.session_id, ce.user_id, ce.element_type, ce.element_id, ce.page_url, ce.event_data_json, ce.created_time FROM hm_clickstream.click_events ce WHERE ce.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
